mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.is_visible = true ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC
SELECT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != ''
